name: Kahlua Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch square pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
4. Melt butter and chocolate together over low heat.
5. Beat eggs and sugar until light.
6. Add flour mixture, chocolate mixture, and 1/4 cup Kahlua.
7. Blend well.
8. Stir in nuts.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until done.
10. Cool in pan.
11. Brush with remaining Kahlua.
